title: Study EST, CST, MST, and PST zones
description: Develop a strong understanding of United States time zones, as all client communication, interviews, and assessments are scheduled according to US timings.

title: Master Daylight Saving Time (DST) concepts
description: Understand when DST begins and ends, which states observe DST, and which states do not follow DST.

title: Calculate time differences between IST and US zones
description: Understand time differences between Indian Standard Time (IST) and US time zones, and how interview timings change after DST adjustments.

title: Learn Immigrant Visas (GC, GC-EAD) rules & validity
description: Develop in-depth knowledge of permanent residency paths, Green Card (GC), Green Card EAD, visa validity, and work rules.

title: Learn Non-Immigrant Visas (F1 OPT/CPT, H1B, H4, L1, L2S, TN, Asylum)
description: Understand validity, work authorization rules, extension processes, and transitions for student, dependent, and employer-sponsored visas.

title: Contrast EAD types and identify sponsorship requirements
description: Understand differences between OPT EAD, STEM EAD, GC EAD, and H4 EAD. Confidently identify which visa holders require sponsorship.

title: Study Steps 1-3 (Sales, Resume, and Marketing Teams)
description: Understand candidate sourcing, onboarding, resume optimization for market demand, applications, and scheduling coordination.

title: Study Steps 4-6 (Technical prep, Mocks, and Interview support)
description: Understand how the technical team conducts mock interviews, creates improvement plans, and supports screening, client, and coding assessments.

title: Attend Resume Understanding SOP walkthrough sessions
description: Review procedures for analyzing profiles, identifying technical highlights, and preparing candidates for active client submissions.

title: Shadow 2-3 active candidate resume prep calls
description: Observe Team Leads reviewing resume projects and tech stacks live on candidate calls.

title: Create sample candidate end-to-end project document
description: Draft sample project writeups detailing system architecture, user flows, and candidate responsibilities.

title: Prepare project architecture diagrams & technology details
description: Draw architectural layouts and outline database schema designs and integration libraries.

title: Conduct 1 supervised candidate resume prep call
description: Lead the resume explanation discussion under lead observation; receive feedback on flow and clarity.

title: Review common resume errors and get Lead sign-off
description: Identify profile discrepancies, verify storyline alignment, and obtain Lead approval to move forward.

title: Observe 2 active mock interviews on the floor
description: Shadow mock sessions, note evaluation rubrics, and learn how to document candidate responses.

title: Learn interviewer tone, pacing, and guiding rules
description: Study guidelines for setting candidate expectations, guiding answers naturally, and managing time.

title: Conduct 1 mock interview under direct supervision
description: Lead a mock interview simulation solo with a lead or buddy observing and grading your performance.

title: Receive detailed evaluation comments & Lead sign-off
description: Review your mock interview grading sheet, resolve gaps, and obtain TL validation.

title: Walk through HackerRank, Codility & test platforms
description: Configure user settings and navigate candidate viewports in main coding test platforms.

title: Learn platform credentials and access protocols
description: Review secure login handling, access templates, and candidate communication pathways.

title: Study screen/audio recording compliance guidelines
description: Understand strict protocols for audio checks, webcam verification, and full-screen screen recording.

title: Shadow 1-2 active assessment support sessions
description: Observe live streams, connection protocols, and note compliance logs.

title: Practice solving coding and analytical reasoning tests
description: Solve internal reasoning, math, and code puzzle worksheets to prepare for candidate queries.

title: Study zero-tolerance rules for assessment support
description: Review compliance triggers, screen share protocols, and credential handling rules.

title: Pass the internal assessment coordinator readiness exam
description: Demonstrate compliance awareness and pass the technical screening tool test for lead signoff.

title: Attend 3 client brief calls as an observer
description: Listen to client intakes and note client requirements and candidate alignment briefs.

title: Learn client communication etiquette and SLAs
description: Study SLA response times, email styling, and professional phrasing rules.

title: Conduct 1 supervised client briefs call
description: Lead a candidate client briefing call under buddy or lead observation.

title: Document candidate details accurately in tracking systems
description: Ensure profile inputs, resume summaries, and client briefs are compiled and logged without delay.

title: Pass the client interaction floor entry validation review
description: Pass live call auditing with your Team Lead to earn floor access rights.

title: Master the 30-20-10 calling protocol & check-ins
description: Learn candidate check-in intervals (30m, 20m, 10m before call) and follow outreach templates.

title: Create calendar invites & CC managers correctly
description: Practice setting up calendar events with correct CC lists and email templates.

title: Shadow two active interview support sessions
description: Watch live interview setups and observe audio and screen-sharing verification steps.

title: Practice audio and screen-sharing verification steps
description: Practice isolating channels, configuring audio feeds, and confirming screen visibility.

title: Conduct one supervised interview support session solo
description: Execute outreach check-ins, invite setup, and feed verification solo under buddy observation.

title: Log live Q&A feeds during active screening calls
description: Record interview questions and answers in real-time document templates.

title: Perform Resume Understanding sessions independently
description: Review candidate profiles and deliver storyline briefings with zero supervision.

title: Conduct candidate mock evaluations independently
description: Grade candidate tech skills, run feedback loops, and write improvement logs solo.

title: Support candidate assessments independently solo
description: Coordinate coding tests and upload recording compliance logs without help.

title: Handle screening support under minimal supervision
description: Organize active screening call logistics and guide candidates.

title: Ensure Zero Error Performance Standards compliance
description: Perform daily audits to guarantee zero missed recordings, zero late check-ins, and complete daily progress reviews.

title: Complete Execution Requirements (intake/interviews/assessments)
description: Deliver 2-3 Resume Understanding sessions, 1-2 interview sessions, and 1-2 assessment support sessions solo for final TL signoff.
